texto: Ever notice how the abbreviation for Testament is Test? I noticed this when I woke up and saw the tabs on my bible. You know that's true in lots of ways. The Old Test. tells about people like Moses, Job and more being tested. In the New Test You have people like Paul, and even Jesus. We as Christians are to study for our Tests in our lives. Most of all we need to study for our final Exam.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amanda Penland: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida.
